title: Quran, Sura 94: Ash-Sharh
description: Sura 94 (Ash-Sharh: The Relief) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 94 (Ash-Sharh: The Relief) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Did We not expand for you your breast? And We removed from you your burden, which had weighed upon your back. And raised high for you your repute. For indeed, with hardship will be ease. Indeed, with hardship will be ease.
